# launchdarkly_integration_delivery_configuration (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly integration delivery configuration data source.

~> **Beta:** This data source wraps a beta LaunchDarkly API. Beta resources may change or be removed in future versions.

This data source allows you to retrieve an integration delivery configuration from your LaunchDarkly project environment.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_integration_delivery_configuration" "fastly_feature_store" {
  project_key     = "example-project"
  env_key         = "production"
  integration_key = "fastly"
  config_id       = "57c1e8b1b8e8c50c3f000001"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) The unique server-assigned ID of the delivery configuration.
- `env_key` (String) The environment key.
- `integration_key` (String) The integration key identifying the persistent feature store integration (for example `fastly`, `cloudflare`, or `vercel`).
- `project_key` (String) The project key.

### Read-Only

- `config` (String) A JSON string representing the integration-specific configuration.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource in the format `project_key/env_key/integration_key/config_id`.
- `name` (String) A human-friendly name for the delivery configuration.
- `on` (Boolean) Whether the delivery configuration is turned on.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with the delivery configuration.
- `version` (Number) The version of the delivery configuration.
